capabilities.title: SPM-1 four gstack planning commands
capabilities.summary: Delivered office-hours, plan-ceo-review, plan-design-review, plan-devex-review commands with planning_workflow.py artifact generation, prog_bridge.py sync (source=spm_planning), and planning gate integration in progress_manager.py

capabilities.title: validate-planning JSON contract
capabilities.summary: Added machine-readable message keys (planning.ready/missing/optional_missing/gate_disabled), exit code 0 for ready/warn and 1 for missing, schema_version 1.0 in all JSON outputs
